news.t: Themes ETFs Launch with Expense Ratios 40% Below the Category Average

holdings.infoBox: GSIB is an equity ETF with a total of 32 individual holdings. The top holdings are State Street stock at 4.14%, Morgan Stanley at 4.05%, The Goldman Sachs Group at 3.95%, UBS Group AG at 3.91%, and Citigroup at 3.79%.

overview.description: The Themes Global Systemically Important Banks ETF (GSIB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund is an actively managed, concentrated portfolio of large-cap stocks selected solely based on the designation as a Global Systemically Important Bank. Stocks are equally weighted in the portfolio. GSIB was launched on Dec 13, 2023 and is issued by Themes.

data.title: Themes ETFs Launch with Expense Ratios 40% Below the Category Average
data.text: Priced at 0.35%, over 40% below the average expense ratio charged by other thematic funds, Themes ETFs seeks to provide investors with targeted thematic exposure at low costs.1 NEW YORK , Dec. 8, 2023...
